text: Hello. Hi. Yes. Hi, my name is Julia. I'm calling about final expense coverage options available in your area. These plans are designed to help your family with funeral or burial expenses. So, can you please confirm, are you between 40 and 85 years old? Yes. Perfect. You're qualified for the low-cost final expense insurance plans. Let me connect you to the plan specialist. Please stay on the line.
